title: Greek Corn Fritters
description: Crispy corn fritters with a hint of citrus and a touch of Greek flair. A perfect snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, yogurt, marmalade, egg, parsley, salt, and pepper.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the corn mixture into the oil.
Flatten the mixture slightly with a spatula.
Cook the fritters for about 4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels.
